super.jwt_auth_subtitle: Configure the optional JWT secret used by JWT-based federation partners.
super.jwt_rotate_note: Rotation invalidates all outstanding tokens. Tokens already in flight during the rotation will fail verification; the requesting partner will create a new token.
super.jwt_rotate_reason_abuse: A federation partner using JWT auth has reported token abuse.
super.jwt_rotate_reason_exposed: You suspect the secret was exposed, such as in source control, logs, or by a former team member.
super.jwt_rotate_reason_routine: You are following a routine rotation schedule. Annual rotation is reasonable.
super.jwt_rotate_step_2_suffix: in the server environment using the same method as initial setup.
super.jwt_rotate_step_4: Notify federation partners that verify tokens issued by this platform. They may need to refresh their trusted-issuer cache.
super.jwt_setup_aws_middle: block through AWS Secrets Manager, or the
super.jwt_setup_docker_env: Docker Compose / plain Linux server with .env file:
super.jwt_setup_docker_no_env_body: add it under the app service's
super.jwt_setup_hosting_panel_body: use the hosting panel's environment-variable editor, such as Plesk PHP Settings > Env Vars or IIS web.config
super.jwt_setup_step_1: Generate a 256-bit random secret on any machine:
super.jwt_setup_step_2: Set it as an environment variable on the server. Use exactly one option below, whichever matches your hosting stack:
super.jwt_setup_step_3_prefix: Restart the PHP container or reload PHP-FPM so the new environment variable is picked up. If you use
super.jwt_setup_step_3_suffix: , run it again before the restart.
super.jwt_setup_step_4: Refresh this page. The status pill should change to Configured.
super.jwt_troubleshoot_config_cache_suffix: , run it again after setting the variable, then restart.
super.jwt_troubleshoot_low_bits: Key bits shows a low number:
super.jwt_troubleshoot_low_bits_body_prefix: Someone used a short or memorable string. Regenerate with
super.jwt_troubleshoot_needed: Federation was working with api_key/hmac and still works. Do I need this at all?
super.jwt_troubleshoot_needed_body: No. JWT is only for the JWT auth method. Existing partners using api_key, hmac, or oauth2 are unaffected.
super.jwt_troubleshoot_not_configured: Status shows Not configured but I set the environment variable:
super.jwt_troubleshoot_printenv: Check that the variable reaches PHP:
super.jwt_troubleshoot_restart: Restart the PHP container. PHP reads environment variables at process start.
super.jwt_warn_not_set_body: JWT-based federation partnerships will fail until the secret is set. API key, HMAC, and OAuth2 partnerships are not affected.
super.jwt_warn_weak_key: JWT secret is weaker than recommended.
super.jwt_warn_weak_key_body: Generate a fresh 256-bit secret and rotate it before relying on JWT federation.
super.jwt_what_p1_intro: NEXUS can authenticate incoming and outgoing federation requests with four different methods:
super.jwt_what_p1_suffix: The first three store credentials per partner in the database. No server-wide config is needed.
super.jwt_what_p2: The JWT method signs tokens with a single server-wide HMAC-SHA256 secret. It is used by the V2 and native-ingest cross-tenant bridges, and by newer partner protocols that prefer signed tokens to API keys.
super.jwt_what_p3_suffix: you can leave this unset. Federation will continue to work through api_key, hmac, or oauth2, and the logs will say clearly when JWT is required.

pilot_inquiry_admin.page_subtitle: Manage incoming Gemeinde pilot region expressions of interest

about.title: About this page
about.body_intro_before_gemeinden: This is the top-of-funnel pipeline for municipalities (
about.body_intro_before_kiss: ) and regions interested in running a NEXUS/
about.body_intro_after_kiss: pilot. Each inquiry is submitted via the public interest form and scored automatically using a fit algorithm (population size, existing Caring Community cooperative, digital readiness, budget indication, and timeline). Use this board to move inquiries through the pipeline, assign them to a sales or community contact, and track when proposals are sent and pilots go live.
about.pipeline_stages: New -> Contacted -> Qualified -> Proposal sent -> Pilot agreed -> Live -> Rejected / Withdrawn.
about.fit_score_after: (0-100) is calculated automatically - 70+ is a strong match. Click any card to view full details, update the stage, or add internal notes.

empty.title: No pilot inquiries yet.
empty.body: Inquiries arrive via the public interest form on the NEXUS sales site. Once submitted, they appear here automatically. Use the stage filter above to check if inquiries exist in other stages.

velocity.title: Pipeline velocity - average days from inquiry submission to each milestone:
